name: goliath/comp-compatibility
title: Compliance – Compatibility List
description: Stacked bordered list + side image + gradient CTA box.

intro.default: GOLIATH™ is designed to work with all major pallet racking systems. Here's a list of the top 10 racking companies GOLIATH™ is compatible with:

items.default: Link 51 XL, Dexion Mk3, Dexion P90, Mecalux, Stow, Apex, Redirack, PSS (all types), Bito, Hi-Lo Premier Rack & Rack Plan

boxP.default: No problem. GOLIATH™ can be adapted to work with all pallet racking systems. Contact us to discuss your specific racking configuration.
